calendar.matters:
ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE FOR CHANGE OF NAME
Off Calendar Oct-19-2006 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: This cause came on regularly as scheduled for OSC hearing for Change of Name of a TWO Minors.
Dept. 218, Commissioner: Sue Kaplan, Clerk: S. Ravinantapricha, CSR: Ron Sinclair.
Petitioner: Yajaira Barrera Estrada, present in pro per as Guardian ad litem for the Minor: Lesly Rosario Moreo, was sworn and examined.
No objections to the proposed change of name were made at the hearing.
It appears to the satisfaction of the Court that all the allegations in the petition are true, correct, and sufficient and that the petition should be granted.
The Court grants the petition for Change of Name of a Minors to: Lesly Vega.
Decree signed in open court.

ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE FOR CHANGE OF NAME
Off Calendar Sep-28-2006 Reset To Oct-19-06 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 218 For Order To Show Cause
MINI MINUTES: This cause came on regularly as scheduled for OSC hearing for Change of Name of a Minor.
Commissioner: Sue Kaplan, Clerk: S. Ravinantapricha, CSR: Diana Chen.
Petitioner: Yajaira Barrera Estrada, present in pro per as Guardian ad litem for the Minor: Lesly Rosario Moreno, and with Spanish Interpreter: Arthur Vega.
Petitioner and Interpreter were sworn and examined.
Application and request for an Order Dispensing Notice, rec'd and filed in court.
After reviewing the Application and hearing the testimony of the Petitioner, the request is DENIED without prejudice.
Lacks the Minor's Father consent or proof of service or notice, the OSC for Change of Name of a Minor is continued to Oct. 19, 2006 at 9:00 a.m. in Dept. 218.
Petitioner to submit proof of service to the Minor's father of the new hearing date or re-file with Declartion and Application for an Order Dispensing Notice.
No objections to the proposed change of name were made at the hearing.
